summary: The chapter follows the protagonist testing a new combat technique on Mud Trolls before transitioning to his activities as a popular streamer. While broadcasting, he confronts several 'drivers'—paid players leveling accounts for others—in the Colosseum. After exposing a fan who turns out to be a driver, the protagonist forces the player to repent for their actions on stream before initiating an interview segment.
key_moments: The protagonist tests a new technique on Mud Trolls to level up.
Kale and the Boss discuss the production of a new show called 'King of Masked Combat'.
The protagonist encounters and defeats multiple 'drivers' during a live-streamed PvP session.
The protagonist confronts a fan who is revealed to be a driver and forces them to repent on air.
